category_sources: source_facts.description says interpreter of simple text adventures; official homepage says INSTEAD creates text-graphic adventure games and can be used as a simple 2D engine.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses INSTEAD as the project name.
docs_sources: Official homepage says developer documentation is distributed in the project doc directory and links documentation on GitHub.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official homepage describes adventure games, Lua game code, and 2D engine use.
